- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project

- [x] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions

- [x] Compile the Project

- [x] Create and Run Task (static site; manual run not required beyond local server)

- [x] Launch the Project (served via python -m http.server 8000)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated; instructions cleaned)

Guidelines: work through checklist, keep communication concise, use current directory as root, avoid unnecessary links or media.
